title: Resource Trees
description:
This mod adds a new way to get resources,

Don't have to go to the mines anymore when Resources grows on trees!.
body:
![Title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c1a430366f244b8ba977156a73c3a0267523b79b.png)


---
### **THIS MOD REQUIRES FABRIC API** ###



"Am I allowed to use this in modpa-"

YES

if you hate the recipes, edit them with kube js :)

---

~~If you break **oak leaves** you get acorns. **I'm working on updating the mod to 1.20.3 and 4 but I'm rusty soo yeah lol**~~

---~~~~

### **What trees does this add???***
1. **Crooks!**~~~~
   1. Wooden Crook (4 sticks)
   2. Stone crook (4 stone sticks)
   3. Iron crook (4 Iron Rods)


2. **Petrified trees (1.18.2 only)**
    1. Petrified acorn
    2. Petrified resin


3. **Coal trees**
   1. Coal acorn
   2. Coal resin


4. **Copper Trees**
    1. Copper Acorn
    2. Copper Resin

5. **Lapis Trees**
    1. Lapis Acorn
    2. Lapis Resin

6. **Redstone Trees**
   1. Redstone Acorn
   2. Redstone Resin

7. **Iron Trees**
   1. Iron Acorn
   2. Iron Resin

8. **Gold Trees**
   1. Gold Acorn
   2. Gold Resin

9. **Diamond Trees**
   1. Diamond Acorn
   2. Diamond Resin
